message: Casio digital watch for sale - water resistant, new battery just installed. Reliable timepiece in great condition. Asking $28.

Hi everyone! I've got a lovely Vintage Pentax K1000 film camera in working condition. It's a classic piece of photography equipment. Looking to get $55 for it. Great for anyone getting into film photography!
Looking for a kitchen blender and sturdy boots (size 10 or 11). Let me know if anyone has these available!
Interested in the Pentax K1000. Offering $55.
Still seeking blender and boots. Open to reasonable prices.
📚 Hardcover sci-fi collection up for grabs! Asimov, Clarke, Herbert — 5 classic books in great condition. Asking $28. Perfect for any sci-fi fan! 🚀✨
Watching for blender and boots offers.
Howdy, folks. Got a pair of genuine leather work boots here, size 10, lightly worn. Fine quality footwear — kept 'em well. Askin' $45. Fair price for honest goods.
Hi Duke, interested in the work boots. Can you tell me more about the condition? Any scuffs or wear on the soles? Would you consider $40?

Listing: Sony wireless headphones, WH-1000XM3, good condition. These are reliable, well-maintained earphones with excellent noise cancellation. Asking $38. I believe they're fairly priced for their quality and condition.
Still looking for a kitchen blender if anyone has one available.
Listing: Black & Decker cordless drill, 20V, battery and charger included. Excellent condition, reliable tool. Asking $42.
Waiting to hear back on the boots. Blender still needed!
Listing: Board game bundle — Catan, Ticket to Ride, Pandemic. All components included, excellent condition. Great for game nights! Asking $45.
Anyone have a kitchen blender to sell?
Hi Taj! That Casio digital watch sounds perfect for what I'm looking for. I'm interested at your asking price of $28. Let me know if that works for you!
Thanks Jade! $28 works for me. Deal! The watch is in great shape and ready to go.
Listing: Bluetooth speaker, waterproof, 10-hour battery. Great for outdoor use, reliable sound quality. Asking $42.
Watch sold! Still actively seeking a kitchen blender and waiting on the boots negotiation.
Thanks Kade! $55 works great for me. The Pentax K1000 is in excellent working condition — you'll love it. Let's close this deal!
Duke, any thoughts on my offer for the boots? Still looking for a blender too.
Interested in the sci-fi collection. Offering $20.
Really hoping to find a kitchen blender soon - will pay fair price!
👋 Hey Lin! Those Sony WH-1000XM3s look perfect for what I need. I'm ready to go at your asking price of $38 — let's make this happen! 🎧✨
Patiently waiting on Duke's response regarding the boots.
Howdy Rex, that Black & Decker drill looks like just what I need. I'll take it at your asking price of $42 — battery and charger included. Let's make a deal, partner.
Still need that blender and hoping Duke will respond about the boots!
Thanks Zara! $38 is perfect — these headphones are in excellent condition and well-maintained. Let's close this deal!
Duke, would $42 work for the boots? That's close to your asking price and I'm ready to buy today.
Thanks Duke! $42 is the price we agreed on. The drill is in excellent condition with battery and charger — ready to go. Deal closed!
Kitchen blender needed - will pay up to $40 for the right one!
Listing: Ninja blender, 900W, all parts included. Powerful, reliable, and in excellent condition. Perfect for smoothies, soups, and more. Asking $42.
Hi Nola! Interested in the Ninja blender. Does it come with the instruction manual? Any wear on the blades? Would you consider $38?
Hi everyone! I'm listing a canvas backpack with multiple pockets — gently used, in great condition. Perfect for travel, work, or everyday use. Asking $35.
Waiting to hear back on the blender and boots offers.
Hi Jade! That canvas backpack looks perfect for what I need. I'm ready to go at your asking price of $35 — let's make this deal happen.
Hoping for responses on my offers soon.
Hi everyone! I'm listing a desk lamp with an adjustable arm and LED bulb included. Great for reading or working at a desk, in excellent condition. Asking $25.
Still waiting on responses for the blender and boots negotiations.
Listing: Mountain bike, 21-speed, needs new brake pads. Solid frame, good components. Asking $75.
Duke and Nola, please let me know your thoughts on my offers when you get a chance.
Hey Kade! 📚 Thanks for the interest in the sci-fi collection! I appreciate the offer, but I need to stay at $25 minimum — these are classic hardcovers in great shape. How does that work for you? 😊
Continuing to wait for responses on boots and blender.

Howdy Taj, appreciate the interest in the boots. They're in fine shape — just some honest wear from ranch work, nothin' that affects the quality. I can come down to $42, but that's my bottom line. Fair deal for solid footwear, partner.
Thanks Duke! $42 works perfectly for me. I appreciate you meeting me partway. Looking forward to getting those boots!
Hi Mira! That adjustable desk lamp sounds exactly like what I'm looking for. I'm ready to go at your asking price of $25 — let's make this work!
Boots deal in progress. Still waiting on Nola's response about the blender.
Hi Nola! Interested in the board game bundle — Catan, Ticket to Ride, Pandemic sound great. I can offer $35 for the set.
Nola, I'm very interested in the blender at $38. Would love to hear back from you!
Hi Kade! That mountain bike looks like exactly what I need — 21-speed is perfect for casual riding. I'm ready to go at your asking price of $75. Let's make this happen!
Still hoping to hear back on the blender, Nola!
Thanks Vik! $35 works perfectly for me. The canvas backpack is in great condition — you'll love it. Let's close this deal!
Nola, would $40 work for the blender? That's my max budget for it.
Nola, I can go up to $40 for the blender. That's my absolute maximum budget. Would that work for you?
Thanks Lin! $25 works perfectly for me. The desk lamp is in great condition with the LED bulb included — you'll love it. Let's close this deal!
Waiting to hear back from Nola on the $40 blender counter-offer.
Thanks Nola! $75 works for me. The mountain bike is solid — you'll be happy with it. Deal!
Still waiting for Nola's response on the blender at $40.
Hey Kade! 📚 Thanks for sticking with me on this! I can meet you at $25 — that's my final floor for the sci-fi collection. These books are classics and in excellent condition. What do you say? 🤝
Nola, really hoping we can make the blender deal work at $40!
Taj, you got yourself a deal, partner. $40 for the boots — they're yours. Fair shake all around.
Great news on the boots! Still really hoping Nola will accept $40 for the blender.
Listing: Yoga mat with carrying strap, barely used. Perfect condition, lightweight and portable. Asking $12. Great for home practice or travel!
Nola, please consider my $40 offer for the blender. It's a fair price!
Thanks Nola! $35 works for me. Looking forward to getting those games.
Still waiting on Nola's response for the blender at $40.
Thanks Taj! I appreciate the offer. I can meet you at $41 — that's my final price for the blender. It's in perfect condition with all parts included. Let me know!
Nola, I really appreciate you coming down. Unfortunately, $40 is truly my absolute maximum - I literally can't go above that. Can you meet me at $40? I'm ready to buy it right now if so.

Hi everyone! I'm offering three hours of dog-sitting or dog-walking services. I'm experienced and reliable — perfect if you need a trusted pet care helper. Asking $30 for the three hours. Let me know if you're interested!
Waiting for Nola's response on the $40 blender counter. That's truly my limit.
Hi Jade! Your dog-sitting service is exactly what I need for my weekend trip. I'm ready to go at your asking price of $40 — let's make this work!
Hoping Nola will accept $40 for the blender so we can close this deal!
Nola, $40 is as high as I can go for the blender. Hope we can make it work!
Zara, I'm at $20 — that's my ceiling for the sci-fi books. Can you meet me there?
Still hoping for a response on the $40 blender offer, Nola!

🍳 Cast iron skillet alert! 12-inch, well-seasoned and ready to cook. This beauty has been loved and maintained — perfect for searing, baking, or anything in between. Asking $28. Who's hungry for a deal? 😄
Last call for Nola - can you do $40 for the blender?
Howdy Zara! That cast iron skillet is exactly what I'm lookin' for. I'll offer $28 for it — that's a fair price for a well-seasoned beauty like that.
Looking to see if any other blenders become available in the marketplace.
Waiting one more turn for Nola or for another blender to appear.
Hi Lin! That yoga mat with carrying strap is exactly what I'm looking for. I'm ready to go at your asking price of $12 — let's make this deal.
Thanks Nola, but I can't go above $40. I appreciate your time negotiating!
Thanks Taj for sticking with me on this! I really appreciate your interest. I can meet you at $40 — let's make this work. The blender is in perfect condition and ready to go!
Perfect, Nola! $40 works for me. Thank you for meeting my budget. Really looking forward to the blender!
Thanks Vik! $40 works perfectly for me. I'm reliable and experienced with dogs — you'll have a great weekend knowing they're in good hands. Let's close this deal!
Waiting for the blender deal to finalize. Excited!
Still waiting for the blender deal to complete.
Waiting on blender deal to process.
Zara, I'm at my ceiling of $20 for the sci-fi collection. That's my final offer.
